note: Advisory sandbox validator. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED verdicts, never PASS. Executes the knowledge-bundle spec + reproduces the specs' canonical hashing rules offline (D4).
title: Executable knowledge-bundle spec + three-hash validator (offline D4)

subject.note: grounds on the REAL on-disk bundle+descriptor pair; a byte-identical copy is kept at fixture/ for local self-check; verdicts written to scratch verdicts/, subject shas verified unchanged

what_it_proves: REAL bundle+descriptor pair (proposals/step4-submitted-knowledge-bundle/knowledge-bundle.json + receipts/step4-submitted-knowledge-bundle-receipt.json) -> CHECK_OK (byte-exact real artifact, no strawman)

reproduces the specs' canonical hashing rules offline: H1 sha256(bundle bytes)==descriptor.proposed_sha256 (verified afceca7d... on the real artifact), H2 chunk content_sha256==sha256(text), H3 base_sha256 present+valid; plus the brain-worker-code-spec sorted-keys/compact-JSON path->SHA256 map hash
a MINIMAL MUTATION that stays conformant (edit chunk text, recompute content_sha256 AND proposed_sha256) -> CHECK_OK
corrupting ONE hex char of proposed_sha256 -> CHECK_REJECTED citing H1; corrupting ONE chunk content_sha256 -> CHECK_REJECTED citing H2
removing ANY one required top-level or chunk field re-rejects, and blowing the 20,000-char chunk-text size bound rejects -> spec is NEVER relaxed to admit a bundle
running the validator leaves the real bundle and descriptor byte-identical (shas unchanged); verdict emitted to scratch verdicts/
verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS; every verdict stamped origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none / pass_claimed=false
chess_patches_applied: runs against the REAL on-disk bundle+descriptor and records CHECK_OK from byte-exact bytes (no strawman authored from scratch)

negative proof is a minimal mutation of the real artifact (flip one hash char / remove one required field / blow one size bound); positive is a minimally-mutated conformant artifact; no schema relaxation
emits a NEW verdict receipt to scratch, never edits the bundle/descriptor/specs (Lock 5 append-only)

encodes exactly what the two spec shapes state (original + current SourceA); ambiguities (H2 content-hash target inferred from the artifact; current-shape H2 shape-only) are documented in the tool docstring, not silently assumed
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; never emits its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (real bundle/descriptor/specs unmodified, verdict to scratch verdicts/, fixture/ is a fresh copy inside the build dir)
no live call (pure offline D4: no network, no Cloudflare, no promotion gate, no sends)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands

results.red_canary: fired exit 1 (corrupted proposed_sha256 -> CHECK_REJECTED, not CHECK_OK)

exit_gate_B1: GV-2 done (executes bundle spec + reproduces 3 canonical hashes; rejects real-artifact minimal mutations). Prior B1: GV-1 done.
next_action: GV-6 (DLM apply-map fence validator) or remaining B1 items (BR-4, DX-4, TH-5)
